testcase.name: boundedQueueHandlesLoadExceedingCapacity
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-17T21:28:44.381+05:30 WARN 347115 --- [service-dependency-analyzer] [o-auto-1-exec-8] c.d.g.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid request [/api/ingestion/publish]: count 501 exceeds queue capacity 500
